findings.message: New Redis scrape job added (redis-exporter:9121) with no matching alert rules or Grafana dashboard. Additionally, no redis-exporter service is defined in the observability stack.
findings.suggestion: Add redis-exporter service to infra/compose/observability.yml, create infra/observability/prometheus/alerts/redis_alerts.yml with appropriate alert rules, and create infra/observability/grafana/dashboards/redis.json with monitoring dashboard.
